mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO business_status ( business_date, is_open, next_call_number, daily_total_customers, daily_revenue, daily_takeout_count ) VALUES ( #{date}, true, 1, 0, 0.00, 0 )
mapper.update: INSERT INTO business_status ( business_date, is_open, next_call_number, daily_total_customers ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{isOpen}, #{nextCallNumber}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_open = VALUES(is_open), next_call_number = VALUES(next_call_number)
mapper.select: SELECT bs.business_date AS date, bs.daily_revenue AS revenue, bs.daily_total_customers AS customers, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table_orders WHERE DATE(order_time) = bs.business_date AND status = 'CHECKED_OUT' ) AS orderCount FROM business_status bs WHERE bs.business_date = #{date}

SELECT bs.business_date as report_date, COALESCE(COUNT(o.order_id), 0) as order_count, bs.daily_revenue as total_revenue, bs.daily_total_customers as total_customers FROM business_status bs LEFT JOIN table_orders o ON DATE(o.order_time) = bs.business_date AND o.status = 'CHECKED_OUT' WHERE bs.business_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY bs.business_date, bs.daily_revenue, bs.daily_total_customers ORDER BY bs.business_date
